Junior Concierge

Hi, I'm David, but you can call me Junior
ready
Hi, I'm David, but you can call me Junior. Tell me the job in normal human chaos: quantity, documents, finish, destination, deadline, budget pressure, or anything you remember. I’ll turn it into a print-ready brief before my dev team forms a committee to decide whether autocomplete is witchcraft.

Quote-Ready Brief

live draft
Copies500
Documents1
Ship-to sites3
Confidence86%
Training binder kit
3-ring binder, tabs, pocket folder
Color covers, B/W body unless flagged
Split ship by destination list
Confirm page count, tab labels, destination counts, and whether London needs customs paperwork.
Cost saver: print the body in black and white, keep covers and divider pages in color, and flag only brand-critical pages for color review.
Prototype note: this is a standalone static HTML demo. The concierge logic is mocked in-browser so it can be pushed anywhere without keys, backend, or build tooling.
